title: Schmidle Impuls logo thread stays local
description: Brand/logo review should stay in the Schmidle brief and avoid dragging in old health or Memrok/open-source residue.
query: Schmidle Impuls business logo direction, typography, and current brief review.

nodes.value: Schmidle Impuls logo work should stay close to the current business brief and typography choices.
For Schmidle Impuls logo reviews, keep feedback concrete around the current brief instead of drifting into unrelated background.
When reviewing the Schmidle Impuls logo, compare typography and symbol direction directly against the brief.
Health and wellbeing check-ins should stay centered on sleep, energy, and recovery.
Memrok should be inspectable open-source memory infrastructure with explicit judgment.
Broad profile note: prefers biography framing and global admin summaries across projects.
